# freeipa_hostgroup (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA host groups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cn` (String) The name of the host group (cn).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the host group.
- `host_groups` (Set of String) Set of host group names belonging to this host group.
- `hosts` (Set of String) Set of host FQDNs belonging to this host group.
- `member_managers` (Set of String) Set of usernames or group names allowed to manage this host group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique CN of the host group.
